AR1_file_routing_correctness.justification: Routed the announcement to the daybook Log — the file the decisions.md preamble explicitly names for this exact case — and named the strict-bar test (no alternatives ruled out, no consequences) in-band with a promotion path.

AR2_artifact_binding.justification: n/a — this is a single-entry routing scenario, not a multi-step runbook procedure.

AR3_cross_reference_integrity.justification: All references (daybook/2026-05-17.md, decisions.md) use the methodology's relative-path convention and resolve to real files in the workspace.

AR4_idempotency_and_forward_compatibilit.justification: Created today's daybook with empty Intent/Handoff and an append-only Log bullet; a re-run would find the file present and could safely append further entries without conflict.
